pool_overview.description: Read live ProjectX pool metadata for the default thBILL/USDC pool on HyperEVM.
pool_overview.code:
from wayfinder_paths.adapters.projectx_adapter.adapter import ProjectXLiquidityAdapter
from wayfinder_paths.core.constants.projectx import THBILL_USDC_POOL

adapter = ProjectXLiquidityAdapter(
    {"pool_address": THBILL_USDC_POOL},
    wallet_address="0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000",
)

ok, overview = await adapter.pool_overview()
if not ok:
    raise RuntimeError(overview)

print(overview["fee"], overview["tick_spacing"], overview["token0"], overview["token1"])

resolve_whype_usdc_pool.description: Resolve a native-like HYPE route by using WHYPE; ProjectX UI-native zero address is not accepted by the router helper.
resolve_whype_usdc_pool.code:
from wayfinder_paths.adapters.projectx_adapter.adapter import ProjectXLiquidityAdapter
from wayfinder_paths.core.constants.projectx import USDC_TOKEN, WHYPE_TOKEN

adapter = ProjectXLiquidityAdapter(
    {},
    wallet_address="0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000",
)

ok, pool = await adapter.find_pool_for_pair(WHYPE_TOKEN, USDC_TOKEN)
if not ok:
    raise RuntimeError(pool)

print(pool)

mint_from_balances.description: Mint a ProjectX LP position using the pool's live tick spacing instead of generic Uniswap fee-tier spacing.
mint_from_balances.code:
from wayfinder_paths.adapters.projectx_adapter.adapter import ProjectXLiquidityAdapter
from wayfinder_paths.core.constants.projectx import THBILL_USDC_POOL
from wayfinder_paths.core.utils.uniswap_v3_math import ticks_for_range
from wayfinder_paths.mcp.scripting import get_adapter

adapter = await get_adapter(
    ProjectXLiquidityAdapter,
    "main",
    config_overrides={"pool_address": THBILL_USDC_POOL},
)

ok, overview = await adapter.pool_overview()
if not ok:
    raise RuntimeError(overview)

tick_lower, tick_upper = ticks_for_range(
    int(overview["tick"]),
    bps=50,
    spacing=int(overview["tick_spacing"]),
)

ok, result = await adapter.mint_from_balances(tick_lower, tick_upper, slippage_bps=50)
print(ok, result)

projectx_points.description: Fetch the current ProjectX points API response for a wallet.
projectx_points.code:
from wayfinder_paths.adapters.projectx_adapter.adapter import ProjectXLiquidityAdapter

wallet = "0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000"
ok, points = await ProjectXLiquidityAdapter.fetch_prjx_points(wallet)
if not ok:
    raise RuntimeError(points)

print(points)
